sentences.text: This section describes the Zfhmin standard extension, which provides minimal support for 16-bit half-precision binary floating-point instructions.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zfhmin[] Extension for Minimal Half-Precision Floating-Point

sentences.text: The Zfhmin extension is a subset of the Zfh extension, consisting only of data transfer and conversion instructions.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zfhmin[] Extension for Minimal Half-Precision Floating-Point

sentences.text: Like Zfh, the Zfhmin extension depends on the single-precision floating-point extension, F.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zfhmin[] Extension for Minimal Half-Precision Floating-Point

sentences.text: The expectation is that Zfhmin software primarily uses the half-precision format for storage, performing most computation in higher precision.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zfhmin[] Extension for Minimal Half-Precision Floating-Point

sentences.text: The Zfhmin extension includes the following instructions from the Zfh extension: FLH, FSH, FMV.X.H, FMV.H.X, FCVT.S.H, and FCVT.H.S.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zfhmin[] Extension for Minimal Half-Precision Floating-Point

sentences.text: If the D extension is present, the FCVT.D.H and FCVT.H.D instructions are also included.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zfhmin[] Extension for Minimal Half-Precision Floating-Point

sentences.text: If the Q extension is present, the FCVT.Q.H and FCVT.H.Q instructions are additionally included.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zfhmin[] Extension for Minimal Half-Precision Floating-Point
